---
applyTo: '**/*.cs, **/*.csproj, **/*.fs, **/*.fsproj, **/*.go, **/*.py, **/*.rb, **/*.java, **/*.kt, **/*.ts, **/*.js, **/*.yml, **/*.yaml, **/*.json, **/Dockerfile, **/*.md'
---

consult `.propel/rules/dry-principle-guidelines.md` for the rule details.
